name: Apple Oatmeal Cookies
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 375°F.
In a medium bowl, combine oats, flours, baking powder, baking soda, salt, and cinnamon. Stir until well mixed.
Stir in raisins and apples.
In a large bowl, combine egg, honey, oil, and milk. Stir in dry ingredients. Mix until a smooth batter forms.
Using a rounded teaspoon, drop batter onto ungreased baking sheets, leaving about 2 inches between each cookie.
Press dough with fingers dipped in water to form cookies about 1 1/2 inches in diameter.
Bake for 10 to 12 minutes or until lightly golden. Transfer cookies to a wire rack to cool.
